name: about
title: About Me
content:
Meet the girl who turned her doodles in high school notebooks into a full-blown career, one inked masterpiece at a time. Armed with a tattoo machine and an unreasonable number of black T-shirts, I’ve been  making the world a little more permanent since 2016, when I started my tattoo career in Turkey. In 2018, I packed up my gear, moved to Norway, and continued my ink journey from there.

Born with a pencil in one hand and coffee in the other, I knew from an early age that my calling was to cover human canvases with everything from delicate line art to bold sleeves. When I’m not in the studio creating lifelong memories (and possibly some regrettable choices), you can find me sketching new designs, talking clients out of impulsive face tattoos, or explaining for the 100th time why I won’t do anything "tribal."

My motto? “Good vibes only, but better tattoos always.”

If you need something that screams badass or whispers subtle elegance, I’ve got your back—literally. Just be prepared for the occasional existential question while I’m working on your arm.
